channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: On a testé la Garmin Forerunner 170 : une montre de sport abordable qui a (presque) tout d’une grande
item.description: Garmin renouvelle son entrée de gamme running avec les Forerunner 70 et 170. Écran Amoled, fonctions de récupération inédites : que valent ces montres de sport plus abordables ? Voici notre avis complet après avoir testé la Garmin Forerunner 170 Music.

item.title: Velotric Nomad 2 Fat Tire Ebike, Tested and Reviewed (2026)
item.description: This wide-tired bike rolls comfortably over dirt, gravel, and whatever curbs you happen to bounce down.

item.title: IA et consommation d’énergie : l’Europe contre-attaque pour protéger son réseau électrique
item.description: Les datacenters deviennent un véritable sujet industriel, et pour cause : leur consommation d'énergie a explosé avec la multiplication de projets destinés à l'IA générative. Pour éviter de menacer son réseau, l'Europe va encadrer l'infrastructure en place et les projets à venir.

item.title: How to Share a Link to a Particular Phrase
item.description: Modern browsers let you share a link that jumps straight to whatever text you wish to highlight. Here’s how the feature works.

item.title: The Blueair Mini Restful Sunrise Alarm Clock and Air Purifier is the smartest thing I've put on my nightstand this year
item.description: We put Blueair's first-ever sleep-focused purifier to the test to see if combining an air purifier, sunrise alarm and wake-up light in a single bedside device is too good to be true.

item.title: How to watch Andreeva vs Chwalińska: FREE live streams of French Open 2026 Women's Final
item.description: Watch free streams of Mirra Andreeva vs Maja Chwalińska in the French Open 2026 Women's Final – Roland-Garros tennis TV channels, broadcasters and streams.

item.title: Google will pay SpaceX $920 million a month to use xAI's data centers
item.description: Google has just signed a $30 billion AI computing power deal with SpaceX.

item.title: Mi-enceinte Bluetooth, mi-objet d’art, la Samsung Music Studio 5 configurée en 2.1 s’allège de 50 €
item.description: Dévoilée en début d'année, la Samsung Music Studio 5 est une enceinte connectée Bluetooth et Wi-Fi dont le design assez sophistiqué devrait séduire les amateurs d'art. Actuellement, elle peut vous revenir à 299 euros au lieu de 349 euros chez Boulanger, grâce à une ODR.

item.title: 30 Best Father’s Day Gifts for Dads (2026)
item.description: Dads are traditionally tough to shop for—let me help with these handpicked gift ideas for fathers with great taste.

item.title: The Moons of Uranus May Hold the Key to Finding Missing Planets
item.description: New simulations reveal that the moons of Uranus may retain traces of giant planets.

item.title: The Shark ChillPill got me through the hottest day of the year
item.description: This spring, Shark debuted the ChillPill, its personal portable fan. I tried it out, and it helped me survive the hottest day of the year so far.

item.title: ‘It’s Not a Joke’: A ‘Simpsons’ Writer Holds His First Presidential Campaign Rally
item.description: At a small kickoff event in Los Angeles, Dan Greaney explained why he could no longer stand by and watch the demolition of American democracy.

item.title: Star City's most intriguing character doesn't even have a name — as Apple TV star reveals role in new sci-fi series is like 'playing a living ghost'
item.description: You might have noticed that one of the main characters in new Apple TV sci-fi series Star City doesn't actually have a name — but according to actor Rhys Ifans, there's good reason why.

item.title: What to expect from Apple at WWDC 26 on Monday: Siri AI, iOS 27, refined Liquid Glass, John Ternus, and more
item.description: It will be a big day for Apple consumers, who get to see previews of the software that will be available on Apple devices this fall. Maybe some hardware, too. On Monday, June 8, Apple’s annual Worldwide Developers’ Conference (WWDC) kicks off. As its name suggests, the weeklong event is primarily aimed at developers who make apps for Apple’s myriad operating systems. But it’s also a big day for Apple consumers, who get to see previews of the software that will be available on Apple devices this fall....

item.title: Paul Rudd, Nick Jonas and John Carney reveal the songs they wish they had written
item.description: Paul Rudd, Nick Jonas, and legendary filmmaker John Carney meet up with Mashable Executive Producer Mark Stetson and reveal the songs they wish they had been lucky enough to write.

item.title: How to watch Chwalinska vs. Andreeva online for free
item.description: How to watch French Open final for free. Live stream Chwalinska vs. Andreeva in the 2026 French Open final online for free.

item.title: Motorola effectively bricked its entire line of WiFi routers without explanation
item.description: Motorola's MotoSync+ app, which is required to setup its routers, hasn't worked in weeks. What's going on?

item.title: Lets talk about The Lost Boys musicals post-credits scene
item.description: Mashable asked Michael Arden, the director and co-lighting designer of "The Lost Boys: A New Musical" what this final scene means. Could we be looking forward to a sequel?

item.title: Best of Broadway: What shows were rooting for on Tony Awards night
item.description: From "Schmigadoon!" to "The Lost Boys," here's what we're rooting for at the Tonys.

item.title: How to watch England vs. New Zealand online for free
item.description: How to watch live football for free. Live stream England vs. New Zealand in a 2026 International Friendly for free.

item.title: T-Mobile is giving away the Apple iPhone 17 for free — how to unlock this offer
item.description: How to get the Apple iPhone for free. Get the iPhone 17e, iPhone 17, or iPhone 17 Pro for free with T-Mobile.

item.title: How to watch the 2026 French Open online for free
item.description: How to watch Roland-Garros final for free. Live stream the 2026 French Open final for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: 75 best LGBTQ+ films to stream right now
item.description: "Paris Is Burning," "Rafiki," "Moonlight," "Portrait of a Lady on Fire," "Kiki," "Tangerine," "Brokeback Mountain," and more of the best LGBTQ+ movies to watch this Pride.

item.title: Galaxy Watch 9 et Watch Ultra 2 : la certification confirme une recharge toujours limitée
item.description: À quelques semaines du prochain Galaxy Unpacked, deux nouvelles montres connectées Samsung apparaissent dans une base de certification chinoise. Les documents confortent leur existence et confirment une recharge limitée à 10 W comme les générations précédentes.
